detail.description: Nick Yorke singles on a line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II. Konnor Griffin scores. Joey Bart scores. Oneil Cruz to 3rd.
Nick Yorke homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Nick Yorke singles on a line drive to right fielder Jonny DeLuca. Brandon Lowe scores. Billy Cook to 3rd.
Nick Yorke singles on a ground ball to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Nick Yorke singles on a fly ball to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Nick Yorke singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Nick Yorke doubles (2) on a line drive to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr.
Nick Yorke singles on a ground ball to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Ryan O'Hearn to 2nd.
Nick Yorke singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Tyler O'Neill.
Nick Yorke doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Dylan Beavers. Bryan Reynolds scores. Ryan O'Hearn to 3rd.
Nick Yorke doubles (3) on a line drive to right fielder Michael Conforto.
Nick Yorke singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Ian Happ. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd. Nick Yorke to 2nd. Bryan Reynolds advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by left fielder Ian Happ.
Nick Yorke singles on a line drive to right fielder Michael Conforto. Marcell Ozuna to 3rd.
Nick Yorke singles on a fly ball to center fielder Luis Robert Jr. Nick Gonzales to 2nd.
Nick Yorke singles on a ground ball to right fielder Will Benson.
